title: Dead Cow Farm
content:
An ancient saga tells us how
    In the beginning the First Cow
    (For nothing living yet had birth
    But Elemental Cow on earth)
    Began to lick cold stones and mud:
    Under her warm tongue flesh and blood
    Blossomed, a miracle to believe:
    And so was Adam born, and Eve.
    Here now is chaos once again,
    Primeval mud, cold stones and rain.
    Here flesh decays and blood drips red,
    And the Cow's dead, the old Cow's dead.
meaning:
"Dead Cow Farm" is a quintessential example of Robert von Ranke Graves's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
